description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a symmetrical facade, featuring a prominent gable roof and a covered front porch supported by columns. The exterior is finished in light-colored siding with contrasting window shutters and trim. Large windows are arranged in balanced rows on both floors, providing ample natural light. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, a fenced backyard with a uniquely shaped swimming pool, and landscaped elements such as trees and palm plants. The backyard also features a patio area with outdoor seating and a sun umbrella. The overall design blends traditional and modern suburban architectural elements, creating a welcoming residential environment.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, a covered front porch, driveway, and a fenced backyard with a pool and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway with a car, and a large tree to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, car, and the backyard fence with visible pool and palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, swimming pool, patio area, and palm trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, pool, patio, and the driveway with the car and tree in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, central door, and overhanging roof
